analysis: The project is a static website about black holes with a cosmic theme. The current implementation includes HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files. The CSS file needs to be completed with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The HTML file needs to be completed with all sections properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. The JavaScript file needs to be updated with the improved mobile menu toggle functionality and other interactive elements.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented.
